_comment: Shared CLIENT-SIDE chat config -- single source of truth. Imported by the Vue app (build-time) and read by api.py, which inlines the relevant slice into the barebones Wii page at serve time. NON-SECRET ONLY: secrets like API keys live server-side in api.py / .env, never here. Model: EVERY node is taggable (@handle, default = node key; `mentions.handles` overrides). A node's `nodeActions` are an explicit verb substep after the tag (consequential actions are never auto-fired). claude is conversational (no verbs -- you just talk to it). Unbuilt or unconfigured actions get an out-of-office reply server-side (api.py), the way claude's broke-mode gag does.

dreame.desc: beep so you can find it

dropbox.desc: list cloud saves for a console
